---
title: "Unidimensional IRT"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
source("source.R")
```

## Load Data

```{r}
bundle <- readRDS("data/bundle.rds")

data_all    <- bundle$data_all
accept_vars <- bundle$acceptability_vars

cat("Total respondents:", nrow(data_all), "\n")
cat("Acceptability items:", length(accept_vars), "\n")
cat("Countries:", paste(unique(data_all$country_code), collapse = ", "), "\n")
```

```{r}
#just to check which column names are here:
cat("Columns in data_all:\n")
print(names(data_all))
cat("\n")
```

## Prepare IRT Data

```{r}
# Convert ordered factors to numeric (1-4) and select relevant columns
data_irt <- data_all %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(accept_vars), ~ as.numeric(.x))) %>%
  rename(id = uuid) %>%
  select(id, country_code, age, gender, education, all_of(accept_vars))

# Keep only complete cases
data_complete <- data_irt %>%
  filter(complete.cases(across(all_of(accept_vars))))

cat("Complete cases:", nrow(data_complete), "\n")
cat("Retention rate:", round(100 * nrow(data_complete) / nrow(data_all), 1), "%\n")
```

```{r}
# Item matrix for IRT
items <- data_complete %>%
  select(all_of(accept_vars)) %>%
  as.data.frame()
```

## Descriptive Statistics

```{r}
# Response distribution
response_summary <- items %>%
  pivot_longer(everything()) %>%
  count(value) %>%
  mutate(percent = round(100 * n / sum(n), 1))
print(response_summary)
```

```{r}
# Item means
item_means <- colMeans(items, na.rm = TRUE)

cat("Most acceptable items:\n")
print(round(sort(item_means, decreasing = TRUE)[1:5], 2))

cat("\nLeast acceptable items:\n")
print(round(sort(item_means, decreasing = FALSE)[1:5], 2))
```

```{r}
# Polychoric inter-item correlations
poly_cor <- psych::polychoric(items)$rho

cat("Mean inter-item correlation:", round(mean(poly_cor[lower.tri(poly_cor)]), 3), "\n")
cat("Range:", round(min(poly_cor[lower.tri(poly_cor)]), 3),
    "to", round(max(poly_cor[lower.tri(poly_cor)]), 3), "\n")
```

## Model 1: Graded Response Model (GRM)

```{r}
fit_grm <- mirt(
  data     = items,
  model    = 1,
  itemtype = "graded",
  SE       = TRUE,
  verbose  = FALSE
)
```

```{r}
# Global model fit
fit_stats <- M2(fit_grm)

cat("\nMODEL FIT STATISTICS:\n")
cat("M2 =", round(fit_stats$M2, 2), "\n")
cat("p-value =", round(fit_stats$p, 4), "\n")
cat("RMSEA =", round(fit_stats$RMSEA, 4), "\n")
cat("CFI =", round(fit_stats$CFI, 4), "\n")
cat("TLI =", round(fit_stats$TLI, 4), "\n\n")
```

## Item Parameters

```{r}
# Extract IRT-parameterised coefficients
params         <- coef(fit_grm, IRTpars = TRUE, simplify = TRUE)
item_params    <- as.data.frame(params$items)

cat("Discrimination (a): range", round(min(item_params$a), 2),
    "to", round(max(item_params$a), 2),
    "| mean", round(mean(item_params$a), 2), "\n")

cat("First threshold (b1): range", round(min(item_params$b1), 2),
    "to", round(max(item_params$b1), 2),
    "| mean", round(mean(item_params$b1), 2), "\n")
```

```{r}
# Full parameter table
head(item_params, 28)
```

```{r}
# Save parameters
if (!dir.exists("results")) dir.create("results")
write.csv(item_params, "results/grm_parameters.csv", row.names = TRUE)
write.csv(fit_stats,   "results/grm_fit.csv",        row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
# Extreme item parameters
cat("Highest discrimination (a > 2.0):\n")
print(rownames(item_params[item_params$a > 2.0, ]))

cat("\nLowest discrimination (a < 1.0):\n")
print(rownames(item_params[item_params$a < 1.0, ]))

cat("\nEasiest items (b1 < -0.5):\n")
print(rownames(item_params[item_params$b1 < -0.5, ]))

cat("\nHardest items (b1 > 1.0):\n")
print(rownames(item_params[item_params$b1 > 1.0, ]))
```

## Item Fit

```{r}
itemfit_stats <- itemfit(fit_grm)

poor_fit <- sum(itemfit_stats$p.S_X2 < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE)
cat("Items with poor fit (p < .05):", poor_fit, "out of", length(accept_vars), "\n")
cat("Max RMSEA.S_X2:", round(max(itemfit_stats$RMSEA.S_X2, na.rm = TRUE), 4), "\n")

print(itemfit_stats[, c("item", "S_X2", "RMSEA.S_X2")])
```

```{r}
itemfit_stats <- itemfit(fit_grm)

poor_fit <- sum(itemfit_stats$p.S_X2 < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE)
cat("Items with poor fit (p < .05):", poor_fit, "out of", length(accept_vars), "\n")
cat("Max RMSEA.S_X2:", round(max(itemfit_stats$RMSEA.S_X2, na.rm = TRUE), 4), "\n")

print(itemfit_stats[, c("item", "S_X2", "p.S_X2","RMSEA.S_X2")])

#p.S_X2 is how many items statistically misfit BUT with N = 3216 almost all will be significant
#RMSEA.S_X2 is the practical misfit, and only 0.017
```

## Person Fit

```{r}
personfit_stats <- personfit(fit_grm)

poor_person_fit <- mean(abs(personfit_stats$z.infit) > 1.96)
cat("Proportion with poor person fit:", round(100 * poor_person_fit, 1), "%\n")
```

## Theta Scores

```{r}
# Extract EAP theta scores
theta_grm            <- fscores(fit_grm, method = "EAP", full.scores = TRUE)
data_complete$theta_grm <- theta_grm[, 1]

cat("Mean:", round(mean(data_complete$theta_grm), 3), "\n")
cat("SD:  ", round(sd(data_complete$theta_grm), 3), "\n")
cat("Range:", round(min(data_complete$theta_grm), 2),
    "to", round(max(data_complete$theta_grm), 2), "\n")
```

```{r}
# Theta by country
theta_by_country <- data_complete %>%
  group_by(country_code) %>%
  summarise(
    n    = n(),
    mean = round(mean(theta_grm), 3),
    sd   = round(sd(theta_grm), 3)
  )

print(theta_by_country)
write.csv(theta_by_country, "results/theta_by_country.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
# ANOVA: country differences in theta
anova_result <- aov(theta_grm ~ country_code, data = data_complete)
summary(anova_result)
```

```{r}
# Eta-squared: proportion of variance explained by country
ss        <- summary(anova_result)[[1]]
eta_sq    <- ss["country_code", "Sum Sq"] / sum(ss[, "Sum Sq"])
cat("Eta-squared:", round(eta_sq, 3), "\n")

# 4% of variance
```

## Plots

```{r}
# Plot 1: Item Information Curves
p1 <- itemInfoPlot(fit_grm, facet = TRUE) +
  labs(title = "Item Information Curves")
print(p1)
ggsave("results/plot1_item_information.pdf", p1, width = 12, height = 10)
```

```{r}
# Plot 2: Test Information Function
pdf("results/plot2_test_information.pdf", width = 10, height = 6)
plot(fit_grm, type = "info", main = "Test Information Function")
dev.off()
plot(fit_grm, type = "info", main = "Test Information Function")
```

```{r}
# Plot 3: Item Characteristic Curves
p3 <- tracePlot(fit_grm, facet = TRUE) +
  labs(title = "Item Characteristic Curves")
print(p3)
ggsave("results/plot3_item_curves.pdf", p3, width = 14, height = 10)
```

```{r}
# Plot 4: Wright Map
params_irt      <- coef(fit_grm, IRTpars = TRUE, simplify = TRUE)$items
item_params_irt <- as.data.frame(params_irt)

threshold_data <- data.frame(
  item      = rep(rownames(item_params_irt), 3),
  threshold = c(item_params_irt$b1, item_params_irt$b2, item_params_irt$b3),
  category  = rep(c("b1 (1\u21922)", "b2 (2\u21923)", "b3 (3\u21924)"),
                  each = nrow(item_params_irt))
)

p4_wright <- ggplot() +
  geom_histogram(
    data  = data_complete,
    aes(x = theta_grm, y = after_stat(density)),
    fill  = unname(palette_thesis["teal"]),
    color = "white", alpha = 0.6, bins = 40
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = threshold_data,
    aes(x = threshold, y = -0.05, color = category, shape = category),
    size = 2.5, alpha = 0.9
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "gray40", linewidth = 0.4) +
  scale_colour_threshold() +
  labs(
    title  = "Wright Map: Person Distribution and Item Thresholds",
    x      = "Latent Acceptance (\u03b8)",
    y      = "Density",
    color  = "Threshold",
    shape  = "Threshold"
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

print(p4_wright)
ggsave("results/plot4_wright_map.pdf", p4_wright, width = 12, height = 7)
```

```{r}
# Plot 5: Person Fit
p5 <- personfitPlot(fit_grm) +
  labs(title = "Person Fit Statistics")
print(p5)
ggsave("results/plot5_person_fit.pdf", p5, width = 10, height = 6)
```

```{r}
# Plot 6: Item Fit
p6 <- itemfitPlot(fit_grm) +
  labs(title = "Item Fit Statistics")
print(p6)
ggsave("results/plot6_item_fit.pdf", p6, width = 10, height = 6)
```

```{r}
# Plot 7: Theta density by country
p7 <- ggplot(data_complete, aes(x = theta_grm, fill = country_code)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
  scale_fill_country() +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Latent Acceptance by Country",
    x     = "Theta (Latent Acceptance)",
    y     = "Density",
    fill  = "Country"
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

print(p7)
ggsave("results/plot7_theta_density.pdf", p7, width = 10, height = 6)
```

```{r}
# Plot 8: Theta boxplot by country
p8 <- ggplot(data_complete,
             aes(x = country_code, y = theta_grm, fill = country_code)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7, outlier.alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
  scale_fill_country() +
  labs(
    title = "Latent Acceptance by Country",
    x     = "Country",
    y     = "Theta (Latent Acceptance)"
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

print(p8)
ggsave("results/plot8_theta_boxplot.pdf", p8, width = 8, height = 6)
```

```{r}
# Plot 9: Item difficulty hierarchy
difficulty_data <- data.frame(
  item           = rownames(item_params),
  difficulty     = item_params$b1,
  discrimination = item_params$a
) %>%
  arrange(difficulty) %>%
  mutate(item = factor(item, levels = item))

p9 <- ggplot(difficulty_data, aes(x = difficulty, y = item)) +
  geom_point(aes(size = discrimination),
             color = unname(palette_thesis["slate"]), alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed",
             color = unname(palette_thesis["rose"])) +
  labs(
    title    = "Item Difficulty Hierarchy",
    subtitle = "First threshold (b1); larger points = higher discrimination",
    x        = "Difficulty (b1)",
    y        = NULL,
    size     = "Discrimination"
  )

print(p9)
ggsave("results/plot9_item_difficulty.pdf", p9, width = 10, height = 12)
```

## Model 2: Partial Credit Model (PCM)

```{r}
fit_pcm <- mirt(
  data     = items,
  model    = 1,
  itemtype = "Rasch",
  SE       = TRUE,
  verbose  = FALSE
)
```

```{r}
# PCM model fit
fit_pcm_stats <- M2(fit_pcm)
cat("PCM RMSEA =", round(fit_pcm_stats$RMSEA, 4), "\n")
cat("PCM CFI   =", round(fit_pcm_stats$CFI, 4), "\n")
```

## GRM vs PCM Comparison

```{r}
comparison <- anova(fit_grm, fit_pcm)
print(comparison)

aic_diff <- comparison$AIC[1] - comparison$AIC[2]
cat("ΔAIC (GRM - PCM):", round(aic_diff, 1), "\n")

best_1d_model <- ifelse(aic_diff < -4, "GRM", "PCM")
cat("Preferred model:", best_1d_model, "\n")

write.csv(as.data.frame(comparison), "results/model_comparison_grm_pcm.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)
```

## Save Results

```{r}
# Save dataset with theta scores
final_data <- data_all %>%
  left_join(
    data_complete %>% select(id, theta_grm),
    by = c("uuid" = "id")
  )

write.csv(final_data, "results/data_with_theta.csv", row.names = FALSE)
saveRDS(final_data,   "results/data_with_theta.rds")
saveRDS(fit_grm,      "results/fit_grm.rds")
saveRDS(fit_pcm,      "results/fit_pcm.rds")

cat("Saved: data_with_theta, fit_grm, fit_pcm\n")
cat("Rows:", nrow(final_data), "\n")
```
